title: ericoides lineatum
intro: Ericoides lineatum, also known as the Lineate Ericoides, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. This plant is a type of dwarf shrub that is native to the alpine regions of the Himalayas and is valued for its medicinal properties. The Lineate Ericoides has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Ericoides lineatum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments to harness its medicinal benefits.
